'''zhamodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecectomy|cecectomy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-m-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecectomy|cecectomy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhamodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæmedeth|zhæmedeth]] || [[word:zhæmedej|zhæmedej]] || [[word:zhæmedesh|zhæmedesh]] || [[word:zhæmede|zhæmede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhamomodoth|zhamomodoth]] || [[word:zhamomodoj|zhamomodoj]] || [[word:zhamomodosh|zhamomodosh]] || [[word:zhamomodo|zhamomodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhamodoth|zhamodoth]] || [[word:zhamodoj|zhamodoj]] || [[word:zhamodosh|zhamodosh]] || [[word:zhamodo|zhamodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhamofdoth|zhamofdoth]] || [[word:zhamofdoj|zhamofdoj]] || [[word:zhamofdosh|zhamofdosh]] || [[word:zhamofdof|zhamofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhamodotho|zhamodotho]] || [[word:zhamodojo|zhamodojo]] || [[word:zhamodosho|zhamodosho]] || [[word:zhamodoko|zhamodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhamodoth|zhamodoth]] || [[word:zhamodoj|zhamodoj]] || [[word:zhamodosh|zhamodosh]] || [[word:zhamodo|zhamodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhamodothol|zhamodothol]] || [[word:zhamodojol|zhamodojol]] || [[word:zhamodoshol|zhamodoshol]] || [[word:zhamodokol|zhamodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhamodothotho|zhamodothotho]] || [[word:zhamodojojo|zhamodojojo]] || [[word:zhamodoshosho|zhamodoshosho]] || [[word:zhamodoko|zhamodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhamodothon|zhamodothon]] || [[word:zhamodojon|zhamodojon]] || [[word:zhamodoshon|zhamodoshon]] || [[word:zhamodokon|zhamodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhamodothoro|zhamodothoro]] || [[word:zhamodojoro|zhamodojoro]] || [[word:zhamodoshoro|zhamodoshoro]] || [[word:zhamodokoro|zhamodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
